title: Breakfast at Tiffanys A Conversation between Asukas VA Tiffany Grant and I

wikitext: []: Breakfast at Tiffany's (A Conversation between Asuka's VA, Tiffany Grant, and I)             Quote Post by Voyager1 » Mon Feb 10, 2025 12:47 am During the span of one year, I decided to exchange letters between Tiffany Grant and I discussing our thoughts about the overall series. For posterity's sake, I decided to compile our letters together in an album. For the sake of her privacy I have blacked out any sensitive information about the both of us. With that said, enjoy. https://docs.google.com/document/d/1j1N ... it?tab=t.0

Article: Breakfast at Tiffanys A Conversation between Asukas VA Tiffany Grant and I
[]: Breakfast at Tiffany's (A Conversation between Asuka's VA, Tiffany Grant, and I)             Quote Post by Voyager1 » Mon Feb 10, 2025 12:47 am During the span of one year, I decided to exchange letters between Tiffany Grant and I discussing our thoughts about the overall series. For posterity's sake, I decided to compile our letters together in an album. For the sake of her privacy I have blacked out any sensitive information about the both of us. With that said, enjoy. https://docs.google.com/document/d/1j1N ... it?tab=t.0
